function on_tick()
  local hp = getHp()
  local threshold = 50
  if hp < threshold then
    -- TODO: usePotion()
  else
    move("N")
  end
end

function on_tick()
  for i = 1, 2 do
    move("N")
  end
  for i = 1, 2 do
    move("S")
  end
end

function on_tick()

    usePotion()

end
